notes: Submit CCPA data deletion or delete your account entirely via Settings > Account > Account Ownership and Control
Delete account or submit CCPA data request via Instagram app Settings > Account > Delete Account
Deactivate account (data deleted after 30 days) or submit CCPA deletion at https://help.twitter.com/forms/privacy
Close account or submit CCPA deletion request. Also audit: phone number visibility, profile indexing by search engines (Settings > Visibility)

Submit CCPA data deletion at https://support.google.com/accounts/troubleshooter/7668738 or use 'Results About You' tool to remove personal info from Search: https://myaccount.google.com/data-and-privacy
Manage and delete your data at privacy.apple.com — includes account deletion, data download, and CCPA deletion request
Submit CCPA deletion request at https://account.microsoft.com/privacy or close account at https://account.microsoft.com/account/close
Submit CCPA request at https://www.amazon.com/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=GC5HB5DVMU5Y8CJ2 or close account at https://www.amazon.com/hz/mycd/myx#/home/account/close
Swedish company — GDPR Article 17 erasure right applies globally. Submit via in-app Privacy Settings or email privacy@spotify.com
Delete account via app Settings or submit CCPA request at https://www.tiktok.com/legal/privacy-policy-us (Privacy Settings > Download Your Data)
Delete account via Settings > Account > Delete Account. Submit CCPA data deletion at https://support.reddithelp.com/hc/en-us/requests/new (Privacy & Data category)
Close account via Settings > Account > Close account
Delete account at accounts.snapchat.com/accounts/delete_account. CCPA data request at https://help.snapchat.com/hc/en-us
Email privacy@betterment.com to exercise CCPA right to deletion. Note: cannot delete data required for regulatory compliance
Submit CCPA deletion request at robinhood.com/us/en/support/articles/ccpa-privacy-rights/ or email dpo@robinhood.com
Close account and submit CCPA deletion request at help.coinbase.com. Regulated financial data retained per law
Submit CCPA deletion request via https://www.paypal.com/us/cshelp/article/how-do-i-close-my-paypal-account-help246 or email dpo@paypal.com
Close Venmo account via Settings > Close Venmo Account. Submit CCPA request to PayPal (Venmo's parent)
Close account via Cash App Settings > Account > Close Cash App Account
Delete account at help.dropbox.com/delete-restore/delete-account or email privacy@dropbox.com for CCPA data deletion
Deactivate account via account settings. Submit CCPA request at https://slack.com/trust/compliance/ccpa-faq or email privacy@slack.com
Delete account via Uber app Settings > Privacy > Delete Account or submit CCPA request at https://privacy.uber.com/
Submit CCPA data deletion request at https://www.lyft.com/privacy/ccpa or delete account via Settings
Delete account via Account > Settings > Delete Account. Submit CCPA request at https://www.airbnb.com/help/article/2260
Delete account via DoorDash app Settings > Manage Account > Delete Account
Cancel and delete account at https://help.netflix.com/en/node/87564. Submit CCPA data request at https://www.netflix.com/account/getmyinfo
Close account via Account Settings > Close Account. Submit CCPA request to privacy@eventbrite.com
Delete account via Account Settings > Delete Account or email privacy@replit.com for data deletion
Delete account via Settings > Account > Delete this account. Submit CCPA/data request to privacy@github.com
Delete account via Tinder app Settings > Delete Account. Submit CCPA request at https://www.tinder.com/app/profile#delete
Delete account via Bumble app Settings > Delete Account or email privacy@bumble.com for CCPA data deletion
Delete account via Account Settings. Email privacy@okcupid.com for CCPA data deletion request
Delete account via Hinge app Settings > Delete Account or email privacy@hinge.co for CCPA data deletion
Delete account via Account Settings > Close Account. Email privacy@match.com for CCPA data deletion
Delete account via Steam Support. Submit CCPA data deletion request at https://store.steampowered.com/privacy_agreement/
Delete account via Epic Games account settings or email privacy@epicgames.com for CCPA deletion
Disable account via Settings > Security and Privacy. Full deletion via https://www.twitch.tv/user/delete_account
Delete account via User Settings > My Account > Delete Account. Email privacy@discord.com for CCPA data deletion
Major marketing data broker — opt out at isapps.acxiom.com/optout/optout.aspx. Also submit data access/deletion request at https://www.acxiom.com/about-acxiom/privacy/us-products-privacy-policy/
Major marketing data broker. Opt out at us.epsilon.com/privacy/consumer-choice-portal
Background check and identity data aggregator. Opt out at optout.lexisnexis.com. Also freeze your LexisNexis report to prevent unauthorized background checks
People-search broker. Opt out at spokeo.com/optout — requires email verification. EasyOptOuts covers Spokeo.
People-search broker. Opt out at whitepages.com/suppression-requests. EasyOptOuts covers Whitepages.
People-search broker. Opt out at beenverified.com/faq/opt-out. EasyOptOuts covers BeenVerified.
People-search broker. Opt out at intelius.com/opt-out
People-search broker. Opt out at truthfinder.com/opt-out
People-search broker. Opt out at radaris.com/page/how-to-remove — requires account creation
People-search broker. Opt out at fastpeoplesearch.com/removal
People-search broker. Opt out at truepeoplesearch.com/removal — immediate free removal
People-search broker. Opt out at peoplefinders.com/opt-out
People-search broker. Opt out at instantcheckmate.com/opt-out
Submit CCPA data deletion request at adobe.com/privacy/privacy-contact.html or email privacy@adobe.com. Adobe 2013 breach data is in archives — deletion request targets active account data only
Breach archives are held by third parties and cannot be removed. Monitor via HIBP. Change LinkedIn password and enable 2FA.
HIBP is a notification service, not a data broker. The underlying breach data is held by attackers. No removal possible. Set up free email monitoring at haveibeenpwned.com.
Financial data connector. Submit CCPA deletion at my.plaid.com/privacy or email privacy@plaid.com — this disconnects your bank data from all linked apps
Close account via Acorns app Settings > Account Information > Close Account or email privacy@acorns.com for CCPA deletion
Close account at en.support.wordpress.com/close-account/ or email privacy@automattic.com for CCPA data deletion
Gravatar profiles are publicly indexed. Delete account at Gravatar settings. Email privacy@automattic.com for CCPA deletion
Credit bureau — cannot delete credit history. Freeze your credit at equifax.com/personal/credit-report-services/credit-freeze/ to prevent unauthorized access
Credit bureau — cannot delete credit history. Freeze your credit at experian.com/freeze/center.html to prevent unauthorized access
Credit bureau — cannot delete credit history. Freeze your credit at transunion.com/credit-freeze to prevent unauthorized access

Submit CCPA data deletion request at support.myfitnesspal.com or email privacy@myfitnesspal.com. The 2018 breach data (email, IP, password hash) is in third-party archives and cannot be removed — this request covers your active account data only.
Submit CCPA deletion request at chegg.com/privacy/ccpa. The 2018 breach exposed names, addresses, phone numbers — this deletion request applies to your active account data.
Submit CCPA deletion request by emailing privacy@hottopic.com. The 2024 breach exposed partial credit card data, DOB, and phone — contact them to request deletion of all stored data.
Submit CCPA deletion request at privacy.underarmour.com — covers MyFitnessPal and MapMyRun data (all Under Armour brands).
Italian company — GDPR Article 17 erasure right applies globally. Email privacy@luxottica.com to request deletion. The 2021 breach exposed DOB, addresses, phone numbers.
Submit CCPA deletion request by emailing privacy@advanceautoparts.com. The 2024 breach exposed names, addresses, and phone numbers.
Submit CCPA deletion request by emailing privacy@beckett.com. The 2025 breach exposed names, addresses, phone numbers, and usernames.
WIRED is published by Condé Nast. Submit CCPA deletion request at condenast.com/privacy-policy or email privacy@condenast.com.
Australian company covered by the Australian Privacy Act. Email privacy@sitepoint.com to request data deletion. The 2020 breach exposed bios, emails, IPs, and passwords.
Delete account via Duolingo app Settings > Account > Delete Account, or submit CCPA request at support.duolingo.com/hc/en-us/articles/6098980847501.
Drizly shut down in March 2023 after acquisition by Uber. The service no longer exists — no account deletion possible. The 2020 breach data (DOB, email, password) is in third-party archives.

A credential stuffing threat intelligence dataset — not a consumer service. This data was compiled by attackers and shared in underground forums. No removal possible. It means your email + password combination was used in automated login attacks.

A threat intelligence dataset aggregated by SOCRadar — not a service you signed up for. This represents data that was compiled from other sources. No removal possible. Monitor via HIBP for future breach notifications.
Financial data connector. Revoke app access and submit CCPA deletion at my.plaid.com/privacy — this disconnects your bank accounts from all linked apps.
